problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to to, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
